ddls:
CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Full name of the airport */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the airport */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the airport */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the airport */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the airport */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the airport in meters */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the airport */,
  "icao_code" TEXT /* ICAO code of the airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather event (e.g., Rain, Snow) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather event */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the weather event (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the event in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather observation being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access attempt was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_data" (
  "temp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature record */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding weather observation */,
  "max_temp_c" REAL /* Maximum temperature in Celsius */,
  "mean_temp_c" REAL /* Mean temperature in Celsius */,
  "min_temp_c" REAL /* Minimum temperature in Celsius */,
  "hourly_temps" TEXT /* JSON array of hourly temperature data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("temp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "humidity_data" (
  "humidity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each humidity record */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding weather observation */,
  "max_humidity" INTEGER /* Maximum humidity percentage */,
  "mean_humidity" REAL /* Mean humidity percentage */,
  "min_humidity" REAL /* Minimum humidity percentage */,
  "hourly_humidity" TEXT /* JSON array of hourly humidity data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("humidity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wind_data" (
  "wind_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wind record */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding weather observation */,
  "max_wind_speed_kmh" REAL /* Maximum wind speed in km/h */,
  "mean_wind_speed_kmh" REAL /* Mean wind speed in km/h */,
  "max_gust_speed_kmh" REAL /* Maximum gust speed in km/h */,
  "hourly_wind_speeds" TEXT /* JSON array of hourly wind speed data */,
  "hourly_gust_speeds" TEXT /* JSON array of hourly gust speed data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wind_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pressure_data" (
  "pressure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pressure record */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding weather observation */,
  "max_pressure_hpa" REAL /* Maximum sea level pressure in hPa */,
  "mean_pressure_hpa" REAL /* Mean sea level pressure in hPa */,
  "min_pressure_hpa" REAL /* Minimum sea level pressure in hPa */,
  "hourly_pressures" TEXT /* JSON array of hourly pressure data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pressure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visibility_data" (
  "visibility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visibility record */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding weather observation */,
  "max_visibility_km" REAL /* Maximum visibility in kilometers */,
  "mean_visibility_km" REAL /* Mean visibility in kilometers */,
  "min_visibility_km" REAL /* Minimum visibility in kilometers */,
  "hourly_visibilities" TEXT /* JSON array of hourly visibility data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visibility_id")
)
